description: Kuratong Baleleng is an organized crime syndicate in the Philippines, originally established in 1986 as an anti-communist vigilante group. It became one of the largest syndicates in the country, involved in kidnapping, drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes. The group gained nationwide attention after a 1995 shootout with police in Quezon City. Despite the death of its first leader, the syndicate has scattered across provinces and some members have entered politics.
